code:
doc = Rhino.RhinoDoc.ActiveDoc
plane = Rhino.Geometry.Plane.WorldXY
box = Rhino.Geometry.Box(plane, Rhino.Geometry.Interval(0, 1000), Rhino.Geometry.Interval(0, 1000), Rhino.Geometry.Interval(0, 500))
obj_id = doc.Objects.AddBox(box)
doc.Views.Redraw()
return {"added": obj_id != System.Guid.Empty, "id": str(obj_id)}
